title: SUarmor
description: this mod adds stone and uranium to Minecraft, along with a flower field biome
body:
SUarmor stands for stone/uranium armor. stone armor is normal armor, working half as good as iron. use stone, not cobblestone, to craft it. uranium armor is better, but it's radioactive. danger! there is also a flower field biome with an estimated 12% of the world is covered in it. 

this mod was made with mcreator.

this is my first time making a mod, so it isn't the best. I made this to prank my brother into thinking it's an update!
